title: testing_eshm20: Prospective evaluation of the ESHM20 earthquake rate model for Europe
description:
Reproducibility package for the prospective and pseudo-prospective evaluation of the earthquake rate models underlying the 2020 European Seismic Hazard Model (ESHM20). The experiment tests grid-based forecasts for Europe (Mw 4.9+, 2015-2022) against the EMEC catalogue using testing framework of the Collaboratory for the Study of Earthquake Predictability (CSEP). The package contains the experiment configuration, forecast files, evaluation catalogue, test results, figures and reports. The work in this repository has received funding from the European Union's Horizon research and innovation programme under grant agreement No. 101058518 of the project [Geo-INQUIRE](https://www.geo-inquire.eu/).

Funding: Geo-INQUIRE is funded by the European Commission under project number 101058518 within the HORIZON-INFRA-2021-SERV-01 call.
